name: Shizuma Ikushima
description: Shizuma is a veterinary student and Shohei's older brother. He ended his relationship with his ex-girlfriend, Yuka, after she cheated on him. He identifies as bisexual. Later on, Shizuma graduates from veterinary school and begins his employment as a veterinarian, but his job leaves him with less time to spend with Minato. However, the two agree to move in together. Diligent and charismatic, Shizuma puts a lot of effort into his work and does not give up despite the difficulties he initially enc

name: Shizuri
description: A genius kunoichi who was sent on a mission to protect an ordinary office worker, Atsumi Tsukaki, however, her true identity was that of a NEET geek.
mediaTitles: I'm Living With a Otaku NEET Kunoichi?!
NEET de Otaku na Kunoichi to Naze ka Dousei Hajimemashita

name: Shoukaku
description: Carrier of the Sakura Empire's Fifth Carrier Division. Older sister of Zuikaku.

name: Siduri
description: A priestess and personal assistant to Gilgamesh. She is wise, beloved by the people of Uruk and speaks to the King with sincerity.
mediaTitles: Fate/Grand Order Absolute Demonic Front: Babylonia
searchTerms: Fate/Grand Order Absolute Demonic Front: Babylonia

name: Tadayoshi Tooyama
description: One of the seven main protagonists of RAINBOW. Nicknamed Heitai (Army Corps/ Soldier), he has been detained for acts of violence and false imprisonments. He ruthlessly struck his mother's boyfriend, seriously injuring the man.

name: Takeshi Nakazato
description: Nakazato Takeshi (中里 毅) is the leader of the Myogi NightKids. He made his first appearance at the race in Akina where Keisuke Takahashi of the RedSuns is to race against Takumi. Surprised that Takumi could defeat Keisuke, Takeshi decides that he is going to be the one to challenge and defeat the "Akina downhill specialist", and that the RedSuns are next on his list. He is an intelligent and skilled driver, notably recognizing Takumi's the gutter hook technique while observing the Eight-Six's fir

name: Tomoya Mashiro
description: __Unit:__ Ra✽bits __Club:__ Theater Club __Circles:__ Dramatica, ANIMALS An average guy, for better or worse. Besides being an idol, he is also an aspiring actor. While Tomoya is serious and caring, he is easily swayed by his surroundings. With a mild, humble voice, he delivers energetic, vigorous performances. Serious and determined, Tomoya is someone who always tries his hardest in everything he does. Despite lacking any natural talent, he can be very stubborn once he sets his mind to somethin

name: Tsubaki Aoyagi
description: Tsubaki is a member of the group __[RONDO](https://anilist.co/staff/233550)__. Tsubaki was asked to join the DJ unit, which was lacking a vocalist, by [Aoi](https://anilist.co/character/206288/Aoi-Miyake), and quickly attracted attention as soon as she joined. A born vocalist who has been humming melodies for as long as she can remember. She may have a strong attitude, but she hates to be alone. (Source: D4DJ Fandom)

name: Uto Nakaji
description: __Type:__ Chuunibyou __Occupation:__ Second-Year High School Student __Debut:__ Chapter 94 **Girlfriend No. 019** Uto has a very whimsical personality, often waxing poetic about anything and everything--however, it's usually just nonsense. She calls herself a bard and acts like a wandering minstrel despite being an otherwise normal student. Uto sings and plays the ocarina. Though she appears to play very poorly even causing Mei to open her eyes.
mediaTitles: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You
searchTerms: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You

name: Valeria Trifa
nativeName: ヴァレリア・トリファ
description: __Height:__ 181 cm (Original Body), 192 cm (Heilige Eohl) __Position:__ Seat III Valeria Trifa serves as the LDO's acting leader throughout the years. He had been a Catholic priest even before joining the LDO after he met Reinhard and Karl. Valeria was one of those involved in the opening of Swastikas during the Battle of Berlin and Suwihara City in present-day Japan. He occupies seat III of the Obsidian Round Table and personally represents Reinhard during his absences.

name: Zenos
description: Zenos is a young healer who's been kicked out of the party of adventurers for being deemed useless. He now runs a secret clinic in the slums as he doesn't have a healer's license. Having never received formal training, he is unaware of the magnitude of his power. (Source: Official Site)
mediaTitles: The Brilliant Healer's New Life in the Shadows
Isshun de Chiryou Shiteita no ni Yakutatazu to Tsuihou Sareta Tensai Chiyushi, Yami Healer Toshite Tanoshiku Ikiru 2nd Season

name: Ai Sunakawa
description: Suna's pretty older sister and a student at Ousaki University in Nagoya. Takeo mentions that she, like her brother, is a great and kindhearted person.

name: Akeno Misaki
description: **Height:** 152 cm (5'0") Akeno Misaki, nicknamed Mike (only used by Moeka China, her childhood friend), is the main protagonist of High School Fleet. She is the commanding officer of Harekaze.

name: Allen Sugasano
description: __Height:__ 178 cm A young man who loves hip-hop above all else. He has a scary look in his eyes and isn't friendly, so people find him hard to talk to, but he's actually just awkward. He was born a quarter-Russian to a pianist father and an opera singer mother. He is also from a well-known musical family, but he left home after his parents disapproved of his passion for hip-hop.

name: Anne
description: Anne is a minor character appearing in Stardust Crusaders. Joining the Joestar Group before departing for Singapore, she somehow follows them from there to Pakistan and appears regularly alongside the main characters.
mediaTitles: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 3: Stardust Crusaders
searchTerms: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 3: Stardust Crusaders

name: Arsene Lupin
description: A gentlemanly Parisian thief and a master of disguise who loves playing with his targets, even sending calling cards to his targets to prove he can steal their treasure regardless of their defenses against him.

name: Ayame
description: She is the former owner of "Mysterious Wares Shop Akatsuki" who creates mysterious wares herself. She's currently only 9 years old, but she retained her memories of her past life where she lived to be 103 years old. She's great at taking care of people but she also likes to provoke people when she can. When she knows she can win a fight, she tends to do dangerous things.

name: Belial
description: Belial the Great Flame is a supreme leader in Kisaragi. Daughter of the venerable Kazoku family, Belial helped her friend Astaroth found Kisaragi, alongside Lilith the Dark, becoming head of the combat division. Belial is one of the generals that assign Six to a reconnaissance mission in an alternate world. She openly states that she wanted to go on the mission herself, but due to a bad dice roll, she wasn't picked.

name: Blue
description: A wolfdog who was pet to the family of Quent Yaiden. After the destruction of her home, Kyrios (Curious), and most of her family, she travels with Quent hunting wolves. She lives her life as a pet dog, unaware of her wolf bloodlines. Upon meeting Cheza, the wolf in her is awakened. Unable to continue hunting her own kind, she leaves Quent to travel with the pack to Paradise. She grows especially close to Hige. Blue has black fur and blue eyes, looks, in addition to most likely based after a Grey

name: Chalk
description: Dog from Ishigami Village. He is Suika's friend.

name: Chamber
description: Ledo's mech suit. ~!Sacrifices itself to save Ledo and the people on Earth from the rule of the Striker by blowing itself and the Striker up together.!~
mediaTitles: Gargantia on the Verdurous Planet OVA
Gargantia on the Verdurous Planet OVA (2014)
